title: 3rd Prize – IIT Patna Chemathon
description: Secured 3rd Prize in IICHE Chemathon 2026 organized by IIT Patna & IICHE. Demonstrated strong analytical thinking, engineering knowledge, technical problem-solving, teamwork, and competitive performance at the national level.

title: 3rd Prize – National Paper Presentation & Project Exhibition
competition: National Level Paper Presentation & Project Exhibition

title: 2nd Prize – MBA Fusion Fest 2K25
description: Secured 2nd Prize at MBA Fusion Fest 2K25, TKIET Warananagar. Competed with students from various colleges, showcasing innovation, teamwork, communication, leadership, and presentation skills in a competitive environment.
